user.title: Add a DomoDreams panel
user.description: Pick a discovered panel, or set up a new one.

manual.title: Set up a new panel
manual.description:
Choose an id for this panel — you'll set the **same value** as the panel's **instanceName** in the app (its Settings screen). Leave it blank to generate one.

Already have the panel running and connected to MQTT? Cancel and add it from the **Discovered** card instead — no id needed.

data_description.device_id: The panel's instanceName. Pick something short like living-room and set the same value in the app. Blank = auto-generated.
data_description.name: Shown in Home Assistant. Defaults to the device ID.

error.reserved_device: "discover" is reserved and cannot be used as a device ID.

push_config.name: Push config
push_config.description: Validate and publish the panel's config so it re-renders.

wake.name: Wake
wake.description: Wake the panel from its screensaver.

set_screen.name: Set screen
set_screen.description: Turn the panel screen on, off, or dim it.

page.name: Go to page
page.description: Navigate the panel to a page.

ping.name: Ping
ping.description: Ping the panel and report RTT.

play_media.name: Play media
play_media.description: Play a clip on the panel.

notify.name: Notify
notify.description: Show a notification on the panel: icon or image, title, message, severity, a sound or spoken text, and up to three answer buttons.

level.name: Level
level.description: info, success, warning or error — drives the colour.

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: normal shows a banner without waking the panel; high takes the screen and wakes it.

sound.name: Sound
sound.description: Bundled panel sound (ding, alarm_beep, alarm, alarmo, siren), URL, or a file from Home Assistant's media.

speak.name: Speak
speak.description: Text to say out loud on the panel.

tts_engine.name: Text-to-speech engine
tts_engine.description: Defaults to Home Assistant's default engine.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds on screen; 0 waits for an answer. Default 60.

id.name: Id
id.description: Re-sending the same id replaces that notification.

notify_clear.name: Clear notification
notify_clear.description: Remove a notification from the panel: one by id, or all of them.

id.name: Id
id.description: Leave empty to clear every notification.

discover.name: Discover panels
discover.description: Broadcast a discovery probe and return the panels that reply.
